## What & why

<!-- What does this change, and what problem does it solve? Link any related issue. -->

Closes #

## Type of change

- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] New feature
- [ ] New or updated skill
- [ ] Docs only
- [ ] Refactor / internal

## Checklist

- [ ] Ran `uv run ruff check . && uv run ruff format --check . && uv run mypy && uv run pytest`
- [ ] Added or updated tests
- [ ] Updated docs where relevant
- [ ] Added a `CHANGELOG.md` entry under `## [Unreleased]`
- [ ] For a skill change: bumped that skill's `version` in `meta.yaml`
